data.body: PERF NOTE (from 43a0 review): load_config does NO caching — every call re-stats user_config_path, re-runs the upward discovery walk, and re-parses files. Worse: _pyproject_has_rebar fully parses each pyproject.toml during the walk, and the chosen pyproject is then parsed a SECOND time by _read_toml_table. Fine for one-shot CLI, but once reads route through load_config (fe78) this is hot-path. Memoize on (root, cli_overrides, relevant env); de-dup the pyproject double-parse.
